content:
{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Slide Like You Mean It",
    "Send Data Before You Receive"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "A sliding window of 1KB is used to send data between the sender and receiver.",
    "The sender sends a "ACK" packet after transmitting 1KB of data and waits for an ACK packet from the receiver.",
    "The receiver checks if the data sent is correct and sends ACK if correct, otherwise sends NACK.",
    "If the receiver receives a NACK packet from the sender, the receiver sends a retrans
